requirement_topic.en: Turkmenenergo Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: Turkmenenergo并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: Turkmenenergo併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz項目驗收

summary.en: Turkmenistan's state electricity system is controlled by Turkmenenergo and operates on a 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid. Any EV charger installation connected to public or facility supply should be treated as a project-acceptance matter with Turkmenenergo or the site utility authority, including supply-capacity review, protection settings, metering, earthing, harmonic data, commissioning documentation, and installer qualification. The voltage and frequency nominally match China's domestic baseline, but site-specific grid strength, protection coordination, and desert heat conditions must still be validated.
summary.zh: 土库曼斯坦国家电力系统由Turkmenenergo管理，电网为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。任何接入公共或设施供电的电动汽车充电桩安装均应作为Turkmenenergo或场地供电主管方的项目验收事项处理，包括供电容量审查、保护设定、计量、接地、谐波数据、调试文件和安装方资质。电压和频率名义上与中国国内基线一致，但仍须验证具体场地的电网强度、保护配合和沙漠高温条件。
summary.zht: 土庫曼斯坦國家電力系統由Turkmenenergo管理，電網為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。任何接入公共或設施供電的電動汽車充電樁安裝均應作為Turkmenenergo或場地供電主管方的項目驗收事項處理，包括供電容量審查、保護設定、計量、接地、諧波數據、調試文件和安裝方資質。電壓和頻率名義上與中國國內基線一致，但仍須驗證具體場地的電網強度、保護配合和沙漠高溫條件。

standards_or_laws: Turkmenenergo project connection and commissioning requirements
Turkmenistan 220/380 V 50 Hz electricity supply context
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China's grid is also 220/380 V 50 Hz, so nominal voltage and frequency are not the main gap. The gap is that China grid acceptance, protection settings, and GB/T test reports are not Turkmenenergo approval and do not prove site-specific performance under Turkmenistan operating conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商项目验收文件。中国电网同为220/380 V 50 Hz，因此名义电压和频率并非主要差距。差距在于：中国并网验收、保护设定和GB/T测试报告不是Turkmenenergo批准，也不能证明在土库曼斯坦运行条件下的场地特定性能。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商項目驗收文件。中國電網同為220/380 V 50 Hz，因此名義電壓和頻率並非主要差距。差距在於：中國併網驗收、保護設定和GB/T測試報告不是Turkmenenergo批准，也不能證明在土庫曼斯坦運行條件下的場地特定性能。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm input range, protective-device ratings, earthing system, metering, harmonic current, surge protection, and commissioning documents for the actual Turkmenistan site. A China-ready 220/380 V charger can still fail Turkmenenergo project acceptance if protection settings, harmonics, load calculations, or installation documentation are not prepared for the local project. Desert heat derating should be included even where voltage and frequency match China.
gap.zh: 出口商须针对土库曼斯坦具体场地确认输入范围、保护器件额定值、接地系统、计量、谐波电流、浪涌保护和调试文件。即使充电桩已适配中国220/380 V电网，如保护设定、谐波、负荷计算或安装文件未按当地项目准备，仍可能无法通过Turkmenenergo项目验收。即便电压和频率与中国一致，也应纳入沙漠高温降额。
gap.zht: 出口商須針對土庫曼斯坦具體場地確認輸入範圍、保護器件額定值、接地系統、計量、諧波電流、浪湧保護和調試文件。即使充電樁已適配中國220/380 V電網，如保護設定、諧波、負荷計算或安裝文件未按當地項目準備，仍可能無法通過Turkmenenergo項目驗收。即便電壓和頻率與中國一致，也應納入沙漠高溫降額。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — Turkmenenergo or the relevant site utility authority must accept the project connection, commissioning evidence, and installation documentation
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Turkmenenergo approval substitute

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy of Turkmenistan / Turkmenenergo

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Turkmenistan's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid reduces frequency and voltage conversion risk, but it does not remove Turkmenenergo project acceptance. Prepare site-specific grid, protection, harmonic, metering, commissioning, and desert-heat derating evidence before installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 土库曼斯坦220/380 V 50 Hz电网降低了频率和电压转换风险，但不免除Turkmenenergo项目验收。安装前应准备场地特定的电网、保护、谐波、计量、调试和沙漠高温降额证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 土庫曼斯坦220/380 V 50 Hz電網降低了頻率和電壓轉換風險，但不免除Turkmenenergo項目驗收。安裝前應準備場地特定的電網、保護、諧波、計量、調試和沙漠高溫降額證據。
